variants: Urvashi Datta graduated from Opalbrook College, where she laid the foundation for her diverse career. Currently, she is employed at Glintstream Technology, where her expertise in Valencian speech plays a pivotal role in her professional work. Alongside her job, Urvashi is an active member of the board for Disaster Aid at Whimwood Network, contributing her time and skills to assist during crises. Furthermore, her passion for storytelling has led her to publish her works through Wander Root Publishing, allowing her literary talents to shine in the public eye.
